name: Safeguards for Speech2Speech LLM-Assistants: A Case Study in Automotive Applications

description: arXiv:2607.21180v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent advances have introduced speech-to-speech (S2S) conversational assistants capable of producing natural-sounding interactions, including non-verbal cues like tonality and mood. In the automotive domain, this enables intuitive and humanlike in-car dialogue experiences. However, integrating these end-to-end assistants limits architectural opti...
author: Gregor Endler, Sebastian Kraus, Lukas Stappen
